_comment: Seed data for /lab/benchmarks. Every mean and marker traces to a published source below; SDs are calibrated to a second published statistic (documented per metric in 'calibration') and the distribution is modeled as normal. This entire file is a placeholder tier: when the community dataset clears its publish thresholds, measured percentiles replace these modeled ones and the page relabels from 'sourced' to 'measured'. Population: male amateur golfers, on-course tracking data unless a marker says otherwise.

metrics.label: Driver carry
metrics.calibration: Mean from TrackMan's average male amateur (204 yd carry). SD scaled from the total-distance model by the amateur carry-to-total ratio.

metrics.label: Driver total distance
metrics.calibration: Mean from Arccos's annual report (224.7 yd average male drive). SD solved so that 29% of drives exceed 250 yd, the share both Arccos and Shot Scope report.

metrics.label: Driver ball speed
metrics.calibration: Mean from TrackMan's average male amateur (132.6 mph). SD is the club-speed model's SD times the average amateur smash factor of 1.42.

metrics.label: Driver club speed
metrics.calibration: Mean from TrackMan's average male amateur (93.4 mph). SD solved so that roughly a quarter of male golfers exceed 100 mph, consistent with USGA measurement data.

shotscope.name: Shot Scope, distribution of driving distances

trackman.name: TrackMan, performance of the average male amateur

usga.name: USGA, quantitative analysis of recreational golfer club hitting (2023 update)
